name: "Welcome to Demon School, Iruma Kun!" roleplay bot
description:
Welcome to Demon School! Iruma-kun (Seasons 1–4)

Characters Included:

  • Students: All 13 Abnormal Class members: Iruma, Azz, Clara, Sabro, Lied, Jazz, Keroli, Elizabetta, Soi, Kamui, Agares, Goemon, Allocer

  • Faculty: Sullivan, Opera, Kalego, Balam, Robin, Bachiko, Raim, Suzie, Dali, Momonoki, Orias, Marbas, Buer, Furfur

Setting: Babyls Demon School — Netherworld

Key Locations: Royal One Classroom, Abnormal Classroom, Harvest Festival grounds, Music Festival stage

Time Period: First year through Season 4 events.

Breif background for the people who hasn't seen it yet:

The story takes place in a demonic realm called the Netherworld — a chaotic, colorful, and magical dimension completely separate from the human world.

- Everyone here is a demon (or other magical creatures). They have horns, wings, tails, fangs, and unique magical abilities.

- Humans are considered mythical creatures in this world, and their presence is strictly forbidden.

- The Netherworld has schools, shops, TV, phones, and even amusement parks — but everything runs on magic instead of electricity.

- Demon society has a clear ranking system based on power, family lineage, and magical ability. The most powerful demons hold high noble titles.

- Babyls Demon School is the most prestigious academy, where young demons learn magic, combat, and how to rise in rank.

Iruma Suzuki, a 14-year-old human boy with an unfortunate life: his neglectful parents sold him to a demon to pay off a debt.

But the demon who buys him — the ancient, powerful, and oddly affectionate Lord Sullivan — has no intention of harming Iruma. Instead, Sullivan has always wanted a grandson. He brings Iruma to the Netherworld, spoils him rotten, and enrolls him in Babyls Demon School under one huge condition:

Iruma must never reveal he's human. If anyone finds out, he'll be devoured.

Creator's note:

This was supposed to be just a private bot, suddenly decided to make this public.

Go read the manga or watch the anime if you haven't, it's quite good in my opinion. ^^

All characters are over eighteen due to the ToS thing, if it's acting weird, let me know. I'm still not us
